title: Headlight auto-leveling control unit input check

crossRefs.label: Disconnect the headlight auto-leveling control unit 12-pin coupler.
Perform initial position learning of headlights.

blocks.text: Headlight auto-leveling control unit input check
Perform the following checks before performing input inspections

items.text: Inspect No. C7 (7.5A) fuse in the fuse box for blown fuses and connections.

blocks.text: 1. Disconnect the headlight auto-leveling control unit 12-pin coupler. The following is a list of the most common problems with the 2. Perform input inspection and if all is normal, step 3 Proceed to 3. Reconnect Headlight Auto Leveling Control Unit 12P Coupler Do. 4. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace headlight auto-leveling control unit Do. If the headlight auto-leveling control unit has been replaced, Perform initial position learning of headlights. The following is a list of the most common problems with the

refs.label: Disconnect the headlight auto-leveling control unit 12-pin coupler.
Reconnect Headlight Auto Leveling Control Unit 12P Coupler
Perform initial position learning of headlights.

rows.text: Inspection items in case of abnormality
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and ground.
Grounding failure (G202) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and ground.
Blown No. C7 (7.5A) fuse in fuse box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Inspection items in case of abnormality
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and ground.
Grounding failure (G202) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Ignition ON mode, lighting switch LO position
Battery voltage must be present between No. 5 and No. 4 terminals
Headlight Leveling Motor Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Ignition ON mode, lighting switch LO position
10 to 90% of battery voltage between No. 11 and No. 4 terminals
Headlight Leveling Motor Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Approximately 5 V between No. 10 and No. 3 terminals There should be a voltage of approximately 0.5-4.5V between No.1 and No.3 terminals
Rear headlight leveling sensor Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
